---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new tool, prompt, or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## What would you like?
Describe the feature or improvement.

## Why?
What problem does this solve? What use case does it enable?

## Example usage
How would you use this with Claude? Show an example conversation or tool call.

## Alternatives considered
Any other approaches you've thought about.
